description: Default non-goal patterns to avoid. These are seeded into new weeks and can be customized per-week.

defaults.title: Excessive Meetings
defaults.reason: Too many recurring syncs fragments focus time. Consider consolidating.

defaults.title: After-Hours Work
defaults.reason: Work events outside business hours. Protect work-life balance.

defaults.title: Back-to-Back Meetings
defaults.reason: No buffer between meetings leads to context-switch fatigue.

defaults.title: Unknown Purpose Events
defaults.reason: Events without a clear title make time tracking difficult.

defaults.title: Recurring with No End
defaults.reason: Infinite recurring meetings should be periodically reviewed.

quickAdd.label: Social Media
quickAdd.title: Social Media Distraction
quickAdd.reason: Avoid social media during focus time

quickAdd.label: Email Processing
quickAdd.title: Excessive Email
quickAdd.reason: Batch email processing instead of constant checking

quickAdd.label: Unplanned Meetings
quickAdd.title: Ad-hoc Meeting Requests
quickAdd.pattern: quick call|got a minute|can we chat
quickAdd.reason: Protect calendar from last-minute meeting requests
